full_text:
Pan Xu (Yuanmao) 潘勗 (元茂)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pan Xu (潘勗), styledYuanmao (元茂), was born in Zhongmou in Chenliu. Wrote up the the proclamation that made Cao Cao Duke of Wei. Pan Xu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Pan Xu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
